data.title: Jeanette Weinz of Executive Home Care selected for "50 Women of Wonder" list by Franchise Dictionary Magazine for 2025.
data.description: Jeanette Weinz, President of the Executive Home Care Brand based in Scottsdale, Arizona, has recently been recognized for her outstanding contribution to the franchising industry. She secured a spot on the esteemed "50 Women of Wonder" list for 2025 by Franchise Dictionary Magazine. This list highlights influential female leaders in franchising who are driving innovation and fostering the growth of successful brands. The recognition showcases Weinz's dedication and leadership, emphasizing her role in inspiring positive transformations within the sector.

Russian President Vladimir Putin dismissed Trump’s ‘paper tiger’ remark on NATO, saying the alliance is weak if Russia advances against it. He claimed Ukraine lost 44,700 troops in September and said Kyiv’s leaders should ‘think of coming to an agreement’ with Moscow.

data.title: Ethereum poised for $4,700-$5,000 target by month-end on bullish momentum and MACD positivity, if key resistance breaks.
data.description: Ethereum is experiencing a positive upswing as indicated by the MACD histogram. Analysts predict ETH may reach between $4,700 and $5,000 in the next four weeks if it surpasses a crucial resistance level.

data.title: Law firm Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates Unicycive for investors between March 29, 2024 and June 27, 2025. Contact for losses.
data.description: If you bought or received Unicycive securities between March 29, 2024, and June 27, 2025, and suffered financial losses, Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors to reach out directly. Contact him to explore your potential options.

data.title: Felicia Sanders of Assisted Living Locators named to Franchise Dictionary Magazine's "50 Women of Wonder" list for 2025.
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona on October 3, 2025, Felicia Sanders, the Brand President of Assisted Living Locators, was selected for the prestigious "50 Women of Wonder" list by Franchise Dictionary Magazine for 2025. This recognition showcases women who are leading in the franchising industry. Sanders' influence and achievements have earned her a spot on this annual list, highlighting her impact on the sector.

data.title: Accountants break stereotype by setting Guinness World Record for Longest Line of Calculators with 1,094 devices.
data.description: In Minneapolis on October 3, 2025, a campaign by Scouts Talent aimed to challenge stereotypes about accountants by setting a Guinness World Record for the Longest Line of Calculators. The final count of calculators lined up at the Target Center was an impressive 1,094. This initiative was a bold move to redefine perceptions about accountants, showcasing their creativity and innovation on a global scale.

data.title: Greater Newport Physicians rebrands as MemorialCare Independent Physicians, focusing on value-based care for 47,000+ SoCal patients.
data.description: A new era for physician-led care is being ushered in by MemorialCare Independent Physicians as they adopt a value-based approach focused on outcomes, prevention, and customized treatment for a staggering 47,000 patients in Southern California. Situated in Fountain Valley, this shift signifies a significant progression in healthcare services. The transformation is set to revolutionize patient care in the region.

data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a partner specializing in securities litigation at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Jasper to reach out to him for a consultation. If you bought or obtained securities in Jasper from November 30, 2023, to July 3, 2025, and wish to explore your options, Wilson is available for direct contact.

data.title: Crypto surges as shutdown continues. BTC nears ATH. Etfs see $2.4b inflows in 4 days. BNB hits new ATH. Dex market share shifts. Tokenization to disrupt finance: Tenev. Strategy Stock up 17% in 5 days. CME plans 24/7 crypto trading by 2026. Doublezero launches at $5b FDV. Crypto ETF flows strong. Sharps Tech to buy back $100m shares. Kraken expands equity offerings. Nomura unit to offer crypto trading in Japan.
data.description: Cryptocurrency market continues its upward trend amidst ongoing shutdown, with Bitcoin (BTC) approaching its all-time high. Exchange-traded funds (ETFs) observe an influx of $2.4 billion in just 4 days. Binance Coin (BNB) achieves another all-time high, leading the pack of Layer 1 blockchains this month. The dominance of the perpetual decentralized exchange (Perp DEX) continues to increase, reflecting a shift away from speculative assets. Vlad Tenev predicts that tokenization will revolutionize the financial system. Strategy Stock demonstrates a remarkable growth of 17% within the past 5 days. CME Group plans to extend cryptocurrency perpetual trading to operate 24/7 starting in 2026. Doublezero, with a valuation of $5 billion, launches in the market. Crypto ETF inflows remain robust. Sharps Technologies announces a $100 million share repurchase. Kraken broadens its equity offerings, while a unit of Nomura plans to introduce cryptocurrency trading in Japan.

data.title: Markets remain bullish amid shutdown as INTC sees comeback, traders eye more rate cuts. Day 1: Dow +0.17%, S&P +0.06%, Nasdaq +0.39%, Russell 2K +0.66%, VIX +2.1% to 16.63. Average shutdown lasts 8 days, markets historically flat during and +0.6% post-shutdown.
data.description: The first day of the shutdown saw a positive response from the markets, with Dow Jones up by 0.17%, S&P 500 by 0.06%, Nasdaq by 0.39%, and Russell 2K by 0.66%. The VIX also closed higher by 2.1% at 16.63. Intel is regaining its position as the top U.S. chip producer, with traders anticipating further rate cuts. Market data from Bloomberg reveals that historically, the S&P 500 shows flat performance during shutdowns and a 0.6% increase in the week following. On average, government shutdowns last around 8 days with little impact on the stock market. Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Teamsters Local 135 members strike Brulin Holding Company in Indianapolis over unfair labor practices, demanding fair wages and respect.
data.description: Workers from Brulin Holding Company in Indianapolis, who are part of Teamsters Local 135, have initiated a strike on October 3, 2025. The reason behind the strike is the company's alleged unfair labor practices. The workers affected include those in mechanical, production, and distribution roles. The employees are demanding fair wages and respect from the company. Specific numbers related to the striking workers and their demands are not provided.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims for MoonLake Immunotherapeutics investors who suffered significant losses. Contact James Wilson for legal options.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, urges investors who have experienced substantial losses in MoonLake to reach out to him for a consultation regarding their options. If you have suffered notable losses in MoonLake stock or options and wish to explore your legal avenues, please contact him directly to discuss your situation.
